violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

Various was observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was in unit for over a day. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

Refrigerators were not in good repair. Ambient temperature above 41 degrees. PIC stated new fridges are in the process of being purchased. Units shall no longer be used for TCS foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The non food contact surfaces of the shelving was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Shelving to be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
Canned alkaline water was observed with an accumulation of biofilm on the top lip surface. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of food residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The floors and shelving under the coffee area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
